steps.code: <?php require_once 'wordpress/wp-load.php'; foreach (array(array('hello-world','post'), array('sample-page','page')) as $d) { $p = get_page_by_path($d[0], OBJECT, $d[1]); if ($p) { wp_delete_post($p->ID, true); } } $front = get_page_by_path('fische'); $blog = get_page_by_path('unterwasser-news'); if ($front) { update_option('show_on_front','page'); update_option('page_on_front',$front->ID); } if ($blog) { update_option('page_for_posts',$blog->ID); } $icon = get_posts(array('post_type'=>'attachment','posts_per_page'=>1,'post_status'=>'inherit','meta_query'=>array(array('key'=>'_wp_attached_file','value'=>'cropped-Fisch-Titelseite','compare'=>'LIKE')))); if (!empty($icon)) { update_option('site_icon',$icon[0]->ID); set_theme_mod('custom_logo',$icon[0]->ID); } flush_rewrite_rules();
